top_signals.title: Japan shipping industry sees safety as key to Hormuz navigation
top_signals.summary: All ships will likely resume navigation once hostilities have fully ended and details of mine removal operations are confirmed, Nippon Yusen chair Hitoshi Nagasawa added.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.
